The 40 Year-old Virgin (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $109,607,527Details
International Box Office $66,827,602
Worldwide Box Office $176,435,129
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,422,815 (19.5% of total gross)
Legs:5.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,845 opening theaters/3,006 max. theaters, 7.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $204,315,347

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 19th, 2005 (Wide) by Universal
August 22nd, 2025 (Limited) by Universal (20th Anniversary)
Video Release: December 13th, 2005 by Universal Home Entertainment, released as 40-Year-Old Virgin, The
MPA Rating: R for pervasive sexual content, language and some drug use
Running Time: 116 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Frat Pack
Plot point: Divorcée Romance, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Speed Dating
Source material: Judd Apatow Buddy Comedy
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Judd Apatow, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
